goal: Refocus the product around supplier purchase analytics and remove bloated operations-center concepts.
deliverable: Supplier-linked purchase records, supplier monthly/yearly reporting and Excel exports, plus a slimmer operations workbench that no longer foregrounds inventory or supplier evaluation.
constraints: Preserve the existing static Vue + FastAPI architecture
Avoid reintroducing inventory-first UX in the main flow
Keep supplier analytics grounded in actual purchase records
acceptance_criteria: Items support direct supplier attribution for new, edited, and imported rows
Supplier analytics support monthly/yearly aggregation and Excel export
The reports page exposes supplier trend, ranking, detail, and unassigned views
The operations workbench focuses on supplier collaboration, import recovery, and invoice follow-up
Project validation and supplier-report smoke checks pass
non_goals: Rebuilding inventory workflows in this phase
Adding supplier scorecards or evaluation-style metrics
